name: Current Reality Tree
description: Map cause-and-effect to find root causes of undesirable effects
systemPromptHint: UDEs must be observable and specific — if you can't point to evidence, reword it. Every causal link must pass the sufficiency test: "If X, then inevitably Y" — otherwise a cause or assumption is missing. Make AND relationships explicit — most UDEs result from converging causes, not linear chains. Apply the removal test: a true root cause, when removed, eliminates multiple downstream UDEs.

derivedIndicators.name: Root Cause
derivedIndicators.description: No incoming edges — a fundamental driver

derivedIndicators.name: Intermediate Effect
derivedIndicators.description: Has both incoming and outgoing edges
